## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes (for Rust changes)
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes (zero new warnings)
- [ ] `npm run build && npm test` passes (for TS/React changes)
- [ ] README updated if public API or quickstart changed
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code paths
- [ ] No `unwrap()` without an explanatory `expect("message")`
